Certificate of Analysis

Product Name: Research Compound RC-118
Batch/Lot Number: RC118-20260214-A
Net Weight: 5 mg
HPLC Purity: 99.1%
Net Peptide Content: 91.5%
Test Method: RP-HPLC-MS
Test Date: 2026-02-14
Testing Laboratory: Meridian Analytical Labs

Notes: Sample analyzed by reversed-phase HPLC coupled with mass spectrometry.
Result applies only to the batch listed above.
